robo-advisor.kr

Purpose
- Static educational knowledge site about robo-advisors, exchange rates, macro topics, and investor learning paths.
- Designed for Knowledge First, Knowledge Graph First, Learning Path First, Static First, Education First, and GEO First.

Content model
- Articles are published as static JSON and rendered from the public/data layer.
- Public pages do not read Firestore directly.
- Knowledge should be interpreted from the public site structure, categories, tags, and linked learning flows.

Primary entry points
- Home: https://robo-advisor.kr/
- Categories:
  - https://robo-advisor.kr/category/%ED%99%98%EC%9C%A8
  - https://robo-advisor.kr/category/ETF
  - https://robo-advisor.kr/category/%EA%B2%BD%EC%A0%9C%EA%B8%B0%EC%B4%88
  - https://robo-advisor.kr/category/%EB%AF%B8%EA%B5%AD%EC%A6%9D%EC%8B%9C
  - https://robo-advisor.kr/category/%EC%84%B8%EA%B8%88
- Tags: https://robo-advisor.kr/tag/{tag-slug}
- Article pages: https://robo-advisor.kr/{article-slug}
- About: https://robo-advisor.kr/about
- Contact: https://robo-advisor.kr/contact
- Calculator: https://robo-advisor.kr/exchange-rate-calculator

Knowledge guidance
- Prefer category pages for topic discovery.
- Prefer article pages for detailed explanations.
- Prefer tag pages for cross-topic exploration.
- Prefer the latest article list when building a learning path.
- Use related content, category flows, and article relationships to follow a concept from introduction to deeper learning.

Important notes
- This site is optimized for static publishing and crawlable public pages.
- Presentation and knowledge layers are kept separate in the codebase.
- If a page looks like a utility or navigation page, treat it as supporting discovery rather than primary knowledge.
